CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id INT, value INT);
SET test_schema.variable_name = (SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_schema.test_table WHERE id = 1);
SET comparison_result = (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_schema.test_table) > 1 THEN 'multiple' ELSE 'single' END);
SET nested_result = (SELECT (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_schema.test_table WHERE id = 1) + 50);
SET complex_variable = (SELECT AVG(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_schema.test_table) AS avg_table WHERE value > 50);
SET max_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_schema.test_table WHERE value < 150);
SET join_variable = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_schema.test_table A JOIN test_schema.test_table B ON A.id = B.id WHERE A.value = B.value);
SET updated_variable = (SELECT SUM(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_schema.test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_schema.test_table WHERE value > 100)) AS tmp);
